blind_spots.topic: Rollback infeasibility after data schema divergence
blind_spots.injection_prompt: Assess rollback feasibility: if the deployment includes a database migration (new columns, changed constraints), can you roll back application code without rolling back the database? Forward-only schema changes make code rollback unsafe.

blind_spots.topic: Metric cardinality explosion in high-dimensionality labeling
blind_spots.injection_prompt: Address metric cardinality: labels for customer_id x endpoint x status_code x region can create 75K+ unique time series. Monitoring systems degrade above certain cardinality thresholds. Is there a cardinality budget?

Beyond alerting, address human factors: Are runbooks current and tested? Is on-call sustainable (pages per week, alert fatigue)? What is the bus factor — can more than one person diagnose and fix this system?

blind_spots.topic: CI/CD pipeline as a privileged attack surface
blind_spots.injection_prompt: Treat CI/CD as a privileged attack surface: it has write access to production and executes third-party code. Are pipeline secrets scoped narrowly? Can a compromised GitHub Action exfiltrate secrets? Is there artifact signing (SLSA)?

blind_spots.topic: Cloud cost observability lag and bill shock
blind_spots.injection_prompt: Cloud billing has 24-48 hour lag — a misconfigured autoscaler can accumulate thousands before anyone notices. Is there real-time cost anomaly detection? Are there hard spending limits? Are there zombie resources accumulating charges?
